programme.desc: A variety of news and developments of current events from Indonesia and abroad, complemented by the study of leading ustadz from an Islamic point of view on issues that are in the public spotlight.

programme.title: TAKDIR - EP 20
programme.desc: Takdir is a program which is discussing about disaster, problems, and destiny in human life with different kind of situations in real life.

programme.title: WEDDING AGREEMENT MAS FLOWER BIKIN AUTO BAPER
programme.desc: The story of Fiah and Andre’s marriage—they have different hobbies: Fiah loves pencak silat, and Andre is passionate about flowers—but after they found out Fiah was pregnant, they faced many challenges.

programme.title: TAJWID CINTA - EP 28
programme.desc: Dafri has just returned to Indonesia to meet Alina and get engaged. However, the engagement is hindered because Nadia disapproves of Dafri’s relationship with her daughter, Alina. Nadia deliberately sent Dafri to study in Turkey to keep him away from her daughter. In addition, Dafri’s father asked him to marry Syifa, a woman he had just met for the first time. At that time, Syifa’s wedding fell through because her fiancé, Ilham, suddenly disappeared. After marrying Dafri, Syifa moved with her hu

programme.title: Cewek Cromboloni Menyala Adindakuh
programme.desc: One day, while Dania (Nabila Zavira) was riding her motorcycle, she saw Rangga (Joshua Otay), her boyfriend, with another woman. Dania was shocked because she never expected her boyfriend to be cheating on her with another woman right behind her

programme.title: BADAI PASTI BERLALU - EP 54
programme.desc: 20-year-old Sisca travels to Labuan Bajo to heal her broken heart. During her trip, she ends up helping Valen and Helmi, only to discover a painful truth: Valen is pregnant with Dicky's child. Meanwhile, Leo arrives in Labuan Bajo from Jakarta to conduct a social charity mission, crossing paths with Sisca amidst the drama

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 200
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple living happily and simply in Magelang. They have a daughter, Zahra. Fathir works as a small-scale contractor. Meanwhile, Sukma is simply a homemaker. One day, Fathir lands a major project. Unfortunately, the project runs into trouble. Fathir, Sukma, Zahra, and Ira—Sukma’s adoptive mother—moved to Jakarta. W

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Yang Salah

programme.title: Carca Marba - EP 3
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Karoot Komedia X SR2 - EP 25
programme.desc: Karoot Komedia adalah sebuah rancangan komedi muzikal yang menggabungkan muzik, lakonan sketsa dengan topik-topik menarik yang akan dilakonkan secara spontan oleh pelawak terkenal Malaysia

programme.title: Lawak Minggu Ini - EP 9
programme.desc: Program menarik yang akan menghiburkan anda semua.

programme.title: Life At Thinker - EP 23
programme.desc: Life At Thinker adalah sebuah program vlog atau diari yang memaparkan aktiviti-aktiviti menarik dan kegilaan krew-krew Thinker Studios di sepanjang minggu.

programme.title: RI-OH RIMBA - EP 4
programme.desc: Amir Sisi cabar Hawa, Putera, Ikhmal dan Atu buat cabaran di Kampung Orang Asli?! Macam mana agaknya reaksi mereka dalam Rioh Rimba ni?!

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 19
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 5
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: RSVP Aku Datang - EP 19
programme.desc: RSVP menonjolkan pelbagai acara dari berbagai kaum diMalaysia dari majlis perkahwinan, majlis aqiqah hinggalah ke majlis Ponggal dan banyak lagi.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 10
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan Spontan kanak-kanak yang di hoskan oleh Afdlin Shauki bersama artist and pelawak jemputan

programme.title: Lawak Sorang - Sorang - EP 3
programme.desc: Program komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong? S4 - EP 8
programme.desc: Panel selebriti memilih jawapan berdasarkan kenyataan dan cerita yang mungkin benar atau tidak, 2 kumpulan berentap untuk perolehi markah tertinggi.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 11
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Warna Live: Arena Panggang - EP 2
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Jaguh Kampung 4 - EP 1
programme.desc: Candawara masak-memasak paling gempak ini menyaksikan persaingan di antara jaguh-jaguh kampung

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories - EP 6
programme.desc: Nusantara merupakan satu daerah yang tebal dengan semangat mistik dan alam ghaib. Setiap episod mempunyai penyelesaian yang unik bergantung kepada jenis gangguan, jenis jin dan kesan ke atas watak utama.

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 16
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 11
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Aku Bukan BIMBO - EP 16
programme.desc: Elsuraya percaya Azad adalah punca kematian ibu bapanya dalam satu kemalangan dan membenci lelaki itu yang dalam diam mencintainya. Perkara sebenar disimpan rapi oleh Azad dan sahabat baiknya, Dani Ikram.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 20
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Patah Sayap Bertongkat Paruh - EP 4
programme.desc: Aliah pulang ke kampung halaman bersama anak anaknya setelah berpisah dengan Hisyam. Hisyam tidak mahu melepaskan Aliah. Talhah sahabat Aliah dari kecil sentiasa membantu Aliah di kampung.

programme.title: Zombie Jarum Vaksin
programme.desc: Nisa sangat tertekan dengan tunangnya Farid yang menolak pengambilan vaksin kerana dia sering didatangi mimpi buruk mengenainya dan perkara ini melambatkan proses pernikahan mereka.

programme.title: Teroka Lokal Battle - EP 2
programme.desc: Teroka Lokal Battle adalah rancangan permainan dimana hos dan tetamu jemputan akan diuji pengetahuan mereka tentang Malaysia. Pemenang berpeluang untuk merasai pelbagai makanan lazat Malaysia.

programme.title: Lagi Riuh... Macam Macam Aznil - EP 9
programme.desc: Dato' Aznil Haji Nawawi kini kembali dalam musim terbaru Lagi Riuh Macam Macam Aznil, lebih riuh, lebih meriah and lebih menghiburkan.

programme.title: Renovate - EP 4
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Daiyan Trisha, dia akan mencari rumah yang asalnya biasa atau lama tetapi telah diubahsuai menjadi cantik dengan bantuan arkitek yang berpengalaman.

programme.title: Dalang Prank - EP 14
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan hiburan prank yang melibatkan artis dan peserta yang menjadi dalang kepada prank masing-masing. Prank yang disukai oleh penonton akan dinobatkan Juara Dalang Prank dalam setiap episod.

programme.title: Rahsia Hati Perempuan - EP 21
programme.desc: Mikael, Zayn & Ilaina adalah kawan baik semenjak kecil. Ilaina dan keluarga telah berpindah ke Australia. Berputik cinta antara mereka dan siapakah Arissa?

programme.title: Jangan Lupa Janji - EP 16
programme.desc: Ikmal dan Mikail adalah anak angkat kepada Mona. Ikmal bekerja keras supaya Mikail mendapat pendidikan yang bagus di kolej. Namun Mikail terjerumus dengan pelbagai masalah akibat salah berkawan.

programme.title: Gantung - EP 5
programme.desc: Seorang demi seorang, The Musketeers mula dihantui oleh satu lembaga misteri. Ray dan KJ adalah yang pertama perasan kejadian-kejadian pelik itu. Adakah mereka akan tahu siapa – atau apa lembaga itu?

programme.title: Tiada Hari yang Tak Indah - EP 16
programme.desc: Kisah tentang kehidupan keluarga Hj. Zainal yang mempunyai 3 orang anak perempuan dengan perwatakan yang berbeza. Mereka menghadapi masalah seperti hal keluarga, percintaan, dan persahabatan.

programme.title: JMT - EP 7
programme.desc: Saksikan Michael Ang membawa artis pilihan bersama peminat setianya menjejaki makanan unik dan menyediakan semula hidangan tersebut dengan sentuhan cita rasa tempatan

programme.title: Bintang Minggu Ini SR 2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Saksikan konsert dari artis artis popular terus ke rumah anda.

programme.title: Kutinggalkan Cinta di Okinawa - EP 21
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang Alisa yang cuba untuk menjejaki ibu kandungnya. Sepanjang perjalanan itu dia mengenali Raykal dan Shun. Siapakah di antara dua lelaki ini yang dapat memenangi hati Alisa?

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 HD - EP 3
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

Release Year: 2019 Director: Cherag Ruparel Awards: 2020 Nominee Filmfare Award- Best Debut ActreSS- Shivaleeka Oberoi, 2020 Nominee Filmfare Award- Best Debut Actor-Vardhan Puri

programme.desc: Sameera's boyfriend disappoints her on her birthday and she ends up sleeping with Vivek. Vivek hacks into everything and makes her life miserable. Release Year: 2020 Director: Vikram Bhatt

programme.desc: The story follows the life of a serial killer Ramanna. His strange obsession with Raghavan, a cop. Release Year: 2016 Director: Anurag Kashyap Awards: Nawazuddin Siddiqui received the Best Actor award at the Asia Pacific Screen Awards.

programme.title: Taare Zameen Par
programme.desc: Ishaan is criticised by his parents for his poor academic performance and is sent away to a boarding school. Ram, an art teacher, however, realises he has dyslexia and helps him uncover his potential.

programme.title: Nela Ticket
programme.desc: Nela Ticket, an orphan, is raised by Ananda Bhoopati, who is later killed by his own son, Aditya. However, things turn ugly after Nela Ticket and Aditya come face-to-face.

programme.title: Hurdang

programme.desc: Dharamraaj (Rajendra Kumar) and Balram Choudhary (Sunil Dutt) are two friends who earn their living by farming. To cement their friendship both fathers fix their children's wedding.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: An Action Hero
programme.desc: A murder accusation turns a movie star's own life into an eccentric action thriller as he flees the country, with a vengeful politician hot on his heels.

programme.desc: Police officer Nikhil gets a call from a woman who wants to end her life. as he tries to save her, Nikhil has no idea that it will lead endangering his own family as dark truths

programme.title: Dhokha Round D Corner
programme.desc: A criminal breaks into a married couple's home and takes the wife hostage, igniting a tense standoff that surfaces secrets and lies.

programme.desc: The life of Sardar Udham Singh, a revolutionary freedom fighter best known for assassinating Michael O'Dwyer in London to take revenge for 1919 Jallianwala Bagh massacre in Amritsar

programme.desc: When a masked madman who wants to destroy India steals a dangerous weapon, two elite soldiers must work together to recover it.

programme.desc: Friends at a dinner play a game where everyone unlocks their phones and shares their messages and calls. The game starts out as fun but it takes a turn when secrets are revealed.

programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.desc: A married couple struggles to balance their personal and professional life which causes them to separate and it affects their child.

programme.title: Le Gout Des Rencontres Normandes - EP 9
programme.desc: In Calvados, David Gallienne meets chef Stephane. Together, they tackle two typically Norman sweet and savoury recipes: a shallot and apple tart, accompanied by a country ham with apples flambeed in Calvados.

programme.title: Cash - EP 2
programme.desc: Garance La Fata is in Fribourg for the 12 Heures de l'Auge, a crazy tandem race across the streets of the old town.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Defile Du 14 Juillet 2026
programme.desc: Special edition to mark the July 14th parade, French national holiday.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Le Voyage De Fanny
programme.desc: At the height of the Second World War, 12-year old Fanny looks after her younger sisters in a home, far from their parents. Forced to flee suddenly, she finds herself leading a group of eight children on a dangerous journey across occupied France to reach the Swiss border.

programme.title: La Mort Du Petit Cheval
programme.desc: Gaby is thrown out by her mother, without even a pair of shoes, but with her cat. She quickly ends up at her sister's place.

programme.title: Partir Un Jour
programme.desc: Julien left his home town to build himself a bigger life in Paris, leaving his memories behind him. But one day the published author and future father has no choice but to return.

programme.title: Cesar Wagner - EP 9
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a disused hangar, the whole Jewish Orthodox community of Strasbourg is plunged into mourning. The police asks: Anti-Semitic crime or murder committed by someone close to the victim? Wagner dives into this sensitive investigation.

programme.title: Serieux ? - EP 3
programme.desc: Marie-eve tries to understand how Quebec produces its ''green'' electricity and follows a family as they set out to reduce their daily energy consumption. Mathieu eats local and in even in the street with a walk along an edible pavement, the ''Promenade des Saveurs''.

programme.title: Poulets Grilles - EP 3
programme.desc: Who killed Sofia Popova, the cleaning lady at the Leroy family hotel? The 4th brigade is determined to prove its effectiveness in this investigation. But when a second murder occurs, the main suspect turns out to be Eva. Time is running out to prove her innocence and unmask the killer.

programme.title: Tendance XXI - EP 25
programme.desc: We meet a man of excellent taste, the French pastry chef and chocolatier Pierre Herme, undisputed king of the macaroon and much more. Learn all about the story of the Perfecto. Fancy jewellery by Imai: in keeping with contemporary styles. The right way to wear a shirt.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. Economics, social debates, international news: the expertise of our journalists. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: 64' Debat
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What it's all about: the guests take an in-depth look at a key issue. Increased focus on Francophone cultural news, with dedicated sequences. New weekend features: the French-speaking world, social networks, fake news, politics, sport...

programme.title: L'invite
programme.desc: Patrick Simonin hosts the stars in the headlines, culture, music, film, books, an unmissable rendezvous with all those who light up our times.

programme.title: En Marge Du Monde - EP 10
programme.desc: Initially a photographer, Flaminio became a nomadic shepherd before returning to his childhood village in the province of Bergamo. On the outskirts of Ardesio, he lives without running water, electricity or telephone, makes his clothes, and eats what he grows. Solitary but popular, he participates in the annual Zeneru festival.

programme.title: Le Journal De La Rtbf
programme.desc: Complete international news roundup presented by the RTBF news staff.

programme.title: Fleuve En Eaux Troubles - EP 6
programme.desc: Microplastics are invading the river and contaminating aquatic wildlife. Researchers and artists unite to raise awareness and offer innovative solutions to this invisible pollution.

programme.title: Chroniques D'en Haut - EP 24
programme.desc: A magazine programme devoted to the mountains. An opportunity to explore a rich and fascinating world and take a sumptuous journey through the heart of the most beautiful landscapes of the Auvergne-Rhone-Alpes region.

programme.title: Le Journal Afrique
programme.desc: All the African news from the TV5MONDE news staff.

programme.title: C Dans L'air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village - EP 2
programme.desc: Joelle Scoriels, Gerald Watelet, David Jeanmotte and Livia Dushkoff, Adrien Devyver, Nathalie Guirma, and Martin Charlier each take it in turns to present a different municipality in Wallonia, one that, in their eyes, offers everything you could possibly want!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: En Terre Animale - EP 1
programme.desc: Muffin and Praline may be wearing life jackets, but it's impossible to dive deep enough into the calanques to meet the protected species swimming there... In the garrigue, however, Franck Menestret and his two mascots learn more about the endangered endemic species.

programme.title: Outremer.Gourmand - EP 36
programme.desc: To celebrate the cuisine of the French overseas departments and territories, make a date with each episode featuring a personality from the world of gastronomy. On the menu: discoveries, sharing, and an explosion of flavours!

programme.title: Generation F - EP 17
programme.desc: Rosa Kanno, eco-responsible stylist, creates made-to-measure clothing. Rejecting fast fashion, Rosa designs dresses using 3D modeling, which allows her to adjust creations to the clients' body shapes and limit fabric waste. A Franco-Belgian accessories designer, Sarah Levy creates hybrid pieces designed to free the body and adapt to contemporary movement. Committed to local and sustainable production, she works with Brussels workshops to refine her prototypes in leather and recycled nylon.

programme.title: Cash - EP 3
programme.desc: Meetup in sunny Yverdon-les-Bains to test the knowledge of the day's candidates.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada

programme.title: En Terre Animale - EP 1

programme.title: Mon Plus Beau Village - EP 2

programme.title: Gigantosaurus - EP 2
programme.desc: Four little dinosaurs, Rocky, Bill, Tiny and Mazu, discover a dangerous world where the mysterious Gigantosaurus, the most ferocious of all the dinosaurs, is forever on the prowl. The four best friends set their heading for adventure, confronting their fears and working together to solve all their problems.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 59
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Pompon Ours - EP 60
programme.desc: Seven year-old Pompon is a little bear cub. Full of mischief, he also has a precious talent that delights his best friend Rita and his parents: he can take something ordinary and make it amazing. Thanks to his extraordinary imagination, growing up from day to day becomes child's play.

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 7
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: Defense De Nourrir Les Animaux - EP 8
programme.desc: Surprising foray into the animal kingdom. Infused with humor, these short capsules highlight the distinctive traits of certain species. Scientific facts that are often little-known and almost always bewildering!

programme.title: 1001 Mondes Antiques - EP 8
programme.desc: Braillard, Colombe and Lablatte have discovered a way of travelling back through ancient eras and civilisations. They embark on a journey back in time, passing through popular civilisations such as ancient Egypt and Greece, as well as sub-Saharan Africa, the Middle East and Mesopotamia.

programme.title: Conte-Nous ! - EP 8
programme.desc: A long, long time ago, in the heart of the African savannah, animals still had the gift of speech. It was also a time of story-telling, of tales that had so much to teach us, where the main character was a lion, a hyena, a leopard or a frog.

programme.title: Quasimodo - EP 8
programme.desc: Paris, 1483. 16-year-old Quasimodo is a hunchbacked orphan. One day, the gypsy Esmeralda, with whom he is in love, finds herself in trouble. He sacrifices himself to save her and ends up in prison. And so begins a long series of adventures...

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Demo De Mode - EP 6
programme.desc: 'Ideas are to be caught on the wing'', so said the designer Agnes Trouble who ''doesn't like fashion''. Her cut is simple and eternally on trend. An interview to coincide with her autumn-winter 2024-2025 runway show.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Bon Debarras - EP 1
programme.desc: For this first episode we are in Chamoson in the canton of Valais, with Jerome Vouillamoz, manager of the local tip. Our craft workers for today: Heike Marro and Nicolas Fontaine.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Jeunesses ! - EP 1
programme.desc: In the canton of Vaud, the new year is starting nosily in the streets of Chavornay. The works for the next Giron festival are starting and important elections are being held in the surrounding area. Youths start rehearsing a new play not without difficulty.

programme.title: Jeunesses ! - EP 2
programme.desc: Spring is taking root in the Vaud countryside. Tension is rising in Grandvaux and the theatre contest is finally starting. In Moulins, a youth shoot-out is being organised; in Corcelles, we learn how to waltz; in Chavornay, the Giron festival is starting to take shape.

programme.title: Rassemblance - EP 13
programme.desc: Hasni Bekheira grew up in Grenoble, in the Teisseire neighborhood, where he learned hairdressing at a very young age. Without a diploma but driven by passion, he created Street Coiff. The principle: a chair, clippers and free haircuts for homeless people or detainees. Today recognized, he is proud of this tool of dignity and dialogue.

programme.title: Carte Blanche a Sonia Wieder-Atherton
programme.desc: Cellist Sonia Wieder-Atherton reveals herself through her eclectic musical choices, from Vivaldi to Schubert, from Shostakovich to Nina Simone, via Bach and Pascal Dusapin. An exceptional intimate portrait that captures the intensity of an artist who transcends boundaries and constraints.

programme.title: Movie - Guntur Kaaram
programme.desc: A man seeks explanations when his mother asks him to sign a document denying he is her son while she campaigns for office, years after she deserts him and marries again.

programme.title: Movie - Nenjinile
programme.desc: A man leaves his family for Mumbai to earn money for his sister's wedding. He becomes a hit man, but is forced to choose when the gang he works for wants to kill his girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Movie - Witness
programme.desc: A serial killer known to target prostitutes is on the run. Vikram, a policeman, investigates the case and embarks on a mission to track him down.

programme.title: Movie - Yaaruda Mahesh
programme.desc: A couple in love get married and have a child; the wife works and the husband takes care of the kid. The wife's brother, a psychiatrist, plays a trick on the husband so that he becomes more self aware and finds purpose in life.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ezhaiyin Sirippil
programme.desc: Ganesan is a bus driver. Kousalya, the daughter of his boss, slowly falls for him. But she is shocked when she sees him being accused by a mentally ill woman who holds him responsible for her state.

programme.title: Movie - Unnai Kodu Ennai Tharuven
programme.desc: A boy who is abandoned by his mother is raised by an army officer. He turns out to be a model patriot and joins the army, but his loyalties come under the scanner when he meets a girl and falls in love with her.

programme.title: Movie - Oor Mariyadhai
programme.desc: Rathnavelu loves Rasathi, who is in love with Kannan, brother of Veerapandi, an arch rival of Velu. She is forcefully married to Velu, which invites the death of Kannan and the revenge of his brother.

programme.title: Movie - Naayak
programme.desc: An innocent software engineer lands in trouble due to his lookalike, a righteous vigilante. When they become aware of each other's existence, they team up against an evil politician.

programme.title: Movie - Thennavan
programme.desc: Thennavan, a successful bureaucrat, is appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of the country by the Prime Minister himself. But his radical plan to fix the electoral system goes wrong.

programme.title: Movie - Athiradi Vettai
programme.desc: When a truck collides with his car, an exemplary politician goes into a coma. His police officer son learns that the accident was a deliberate attack and sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and exact his revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Andha Naal
programme.desc: Andha Naal is a Tamil feature film starring Prem Menon and Mohini.

programme.title: Movie - Siragugal
programme.desc: Valli finds herself alone in London when she discovers that her husband is having an extramarital affair. She is helped by Chandrasekar, who is also going through a troubled relationship.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Vedan
programme.desc: Vijay, a policeman, is on a mission to apprehend Bhoopathy, a criminal. He infiltrates the gang to become his right-hand man. But in the bargain, he ends up witnessing the killing of his mentor.

programme.title: Movie - Subash
programme.desc: In order to marry the girl he loves, Subash, a good-for-nothing youth, joins the army. When he returns, he learns that his own brother is using corrupt ways to gain power in politics.

programme.title: Movie - En Thangachi Padichava
programme.desc: When a police officer gets transferred to a troubled village terrorised by a wealthy landlord, he seeks the help of an ex-convict to seize the tyrant.

programme.title: Movie - Ullam Kollai Pogudhey
programme.desc: Anbu, a dubbing artiste, falls in love with his sister's friend Jyothi, who is in love with Gautham. Just when they are about to get married, an accident changes the course of their lives forever.

programme.title: Movie - Kovil
programme.desc: Sakthivel and Angel, whose parents are sworn enemies, fall in love with each other. Things take a turn when Angel's father asks her to take her religious vows.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: PL MASTERCLASS - EP 1
programme.desc: Some of the Premier League's biggest stars take us onto the pitch to discuss the techniques and thought processes that allow them to perform at the highest level. Featuring Dan Burn, Dominik Szoboszlai, Ollie Watkins and Leeds United set pieces.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generation

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: PL WORLD BEATERS - EP 1
programme.desc: A strand that heroes the Premier League stars who could play leading roles for their national teams competing in the FIFA World Cup 2026 this summer. Through wide-ranging interview, these films tell each player's individual story, their journey to stardom and the impact they could make for their nations on the world's biggest stage. Featuring Matheus Cunha, Granit Xhaka, Florian Wirtz and Antoine Semenyo.

programme.title: REVIEW OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (ARS)
programme.desc: As we wave goodbye to another action-packed and compelling Premier League campaign, Review of the Season takes you through the twists and turns of a gripping last 10 months. From how the title was won, the fight for European spots, and the battle to avoid relegation - all the key moments are covered from another scintillating season.

programme.title: NETBUSTERS - ERLING HAALAND'S 100
programme.desc: We celebrate Erling Haaland's record-breaking haul in true Netbusters' style, showcasing every one of his 100 Premier League goals, squeezed into a special 26-minute show.

programme.title: PL BEST OF... PREMIER LEAGUE SCANDINAVIAN STARS
programme.desc: An hour dedicated to the finest Scandinavian football legends, including Peter Schmeichel, Tore Andre Flo, Eidur Guðjohnsen, Freddie Ljungberg, Antti Niemi and more.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 47
programme.desc: We celebrate the rise of Norwegian striking power in the Premier League, exploring how a golden generation in the late 1990s; featuring pioneers like Ole Gunnar Solskjær and Tore Andre Flo helped shatter stereotypes and establish Norway as an unlikely breeding ground for elite forwards. Set against the backdrop of a physically demanding homeland that forged resilience and a relentless mentality, the story also weaves in the presence of Alf-Inge Haaland during that same era, creating a generation

programme.title: GOALS OF THE SEASON - 2025/2026 (HAALAND)
programme.desc: From free-kicks to solo runs, scissor kicks to 30-yard screamers, Goals of the Season revisits some of the most memorable strikes from the 25/26 campaign, whilst paying homage to the Golden Boot winner.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 5
programme.desc: One year on from the tragic death of Diogo Jota and his brother Andre in a car accident, this deeply emotional PL Stories show celebrates the life of one of football's most loved figures. Through interviews with friends, teammates and coaches from Portugal to the Premier League, we look back on Jota's journey, the impact he had on those around him, and the legacy he left behind both on and off the pitch.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 6
programme.desc: We spend the day with Dean Ashton as he reflects on a career that promised so much and was cut short far too soon. From his rise through the Football League to becoming one of the Premier League's most exciting forwards with West Ham United, Ashton looks back on the goals, injuries and moments that shaped his journey in the game. Now working as a respected pundit, we see how his passion and understanding of football continue to drive him long after retirement.

programme.title: REVIEW - MON 13 APR
programme.desc: Review brings you all the action from Matchweek 32. Friday's game sees West Ham host Wolves, Arsenal welcome Bournemouth, Liverpool take on Fulham, and Manchester United close out the round against Leeds United.

programme.title: PL GOATS - EP 3
programme.desc: No Australian has made more Premier League appearances than Mark Schwarzer, so who better to decide on the true Australian GOAT from those who have made the journey from Down Under to the Premier League.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 49
programme.desc: We join Harry Kewell in Vietnam as he embraces a new chapter in coaching, reflecting on a career that took him from prodigious talent to Premier League star. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We spend the day with Julian Dicks as he reflects on a career that made him one of the Premier League's toughest and most uncompromising defenders. Best known for his time at West Ham United, Dicks looks back on the highs, rivalries and intensity of football in the 1990s, as well as the reputation that made him a cult hero with fans. programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 4
programme.desc: Soaring Seagulls' tells the incredible story of Brighton & Hove Albion; from the brink of collapse and years in the lower leagues to becoming one of the Premier League's smartest and most admired clubs. Featuring interviews with the key figures behind Brighton's rise, alongside celebrity fans who followed every twist along the way, this documentary charts a remarkable journey of survival, ambition and one of the greatest comebacks in modern football.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 27
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the second of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Gary Neville. A story on one of the league's most influential right-backs and a leader whose impact still shapes English football today.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Kermit Cintron
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features former champions Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (38-1, 27 KOs) and 'El Asesino' Kermit Cintron (32-2, 28 KOs) in a middleweight battle. The fight took place at the Home Depot Center in Carson, California, USA, on May 8, 2010. This bout is noted for a bizarre injury that saw the fight stopped in the fourth round

programme.title: Wide World of Fights Manny Pacquiao vs. Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: This episode features a bout between boxing legends Manny Pacquiao and Oscar De La Hoya, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Bernard Hopkins vs. Jean Pascal
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light heavyweight championship contest featuring Bernard Hopkins and Jean Pascal meeting for a second time. Their original contest, just five months earlier, resulted in a controversial draw, and the WBC ordered a rematch. Also on the card, action from young heavyweight stud Deontay Wilder.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Episode 3, from Ryogoku Kokugikan in Tokyo, Japan, features Kotoshoho, Shodai, Takayasu and Takanosho.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features undefeated featherweights Yuriorkis Gamboa, 'El Cinclon de Guantanamo', (11-0, 9 KOs) and Marcos Ramirez (25-0, 16 KOs) from the Pechanga Resort and Casino in Temecula, California, USA, on October 4, 2008. The two young fighters had a quick ending street brawl that brought the crowd to its feet.

programme.title: World Karate Federation
programme.desc: The highest level of competition in the sport of karate anywhere in the world will take place from Budapest, Hungary, as the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS take place. The top competitors from across the globe, from six different continents, will all converge on Budapest to stake their claim as the best in the world. Don't miss the WKF SENIOR WORLD CHAMPIONSHIPS, only on FIGHT SPORTS.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 97
programme.desc: France brings championship pedigree, attacking quality and big-match experience, while Morocco looks to build on its fearless campaign with resilience, tactical discipline and swift counterattacks. Expect an intense contest where every moment could prove decisive as two ambitious sides battle for a place among the world's final four.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 98
programme.desc: Spain and Belgium meet in a high-stakes World Cup quarter-final. This clash pits Spain's patient, technical style against Belgium's pace, physicality and clinical finishing. Spain will look to control the tempo through midfield while relying on the creativity of their young stars to unlock Belgium's defence.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Preview Show - EP 2
programme.desc: (Live) Preview Show for FIFA World Cup 2026. The FIFA World Cup 2026 is the largest edition ever, featuring 48 teams and 104 matches across Canada, Mexico, and the United States from June 11 to July 19, 2026.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 90
programme.desc: Paraguay's remarkable World Cup journey faces its biggest challenge yet as they take on tournament favourites France for a place in the quarter-finals. Paraguay will rely on their resilience and disciplined defence to keep their dream run alive, while France look to their attacking stars and tournament pedigree to secure a place in the quarter-finals.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Round of 16: Switzerland vs Colombia - EP 96
programme.desc: Switzerland's disciplined, organized approach meets Colombia's dynamic attacking flair in what promises to be a fiercely contested knockout encounter. With both sides determined to keep their World Cup dreams alive, expect high drama and decisive moments.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 91
programme.desc: Five-time world champions Brazil continue their quest for another FIFA World Cup title as they face a confident Norway side in a tantalising Round of 16 showdown. Expect a fascinating contest between one of football's traditional powerhouses and a team determined to spring another upset.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 92
programme.desc: Mexico and England will meet in a blockbuster Round of 16 clash. With Mexico looking to harness home support and England aiming to continue their pursuit of World Cup glory, expect a high-intensity encounter between two proud footballing nations where the smallest moments could decide who advances.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarter-Finals: Norway vs England - EP 99
programme.desc: England faces tournament surprise Norway in a thrilling 2026 World Cup Quarter-Final in Miami. This high-stakes clash features an elite goalscoring battle between Harry Kane and Erling Haaland as both nations fight for a coveted semi-final spot.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 94
programme.desc: The United States will renew an iconic World Cup rivalry when they face Belgium in a highly anticipated Round of 16 clash. With the hosts eager to continue their dream run and Belgium determined to showcase their knockout experience, expect an exciting contest packed with intensity, quality and high drama.

programme.desc: Argentina will look to their attacking flair and big-match experience as they chase back-to-back World Cup titles, while Switzerland's disciplined defence and composure under pressure make them dangerous opponents capable of frustrating any side.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Match Highlights - EP 99

programme.title: Yakka Dee S06 - EP 20
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'skin', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Dee and our friends show us Grandma's skin, banana skin and some noisy raspberry skin! The journey is repeated with some special surprises along the way, and everyone has a boogie when Dee's friend finally succeeds in saying today's word!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO S01 - EP 18
programme.desc: Messy can't wait for Christmas Day to arrive. He learns that everyone needs to get a good night's sleep, even Mother Christmas!

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops S01 - EP 31
programme.desc: A shark on the loose in the streets of Swoppiton? Mojo and Bo are on a fishing trip to find out more! But the hungry shark might not be quite as hungry-sharky as they think.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 10
programme.desc: It's a lovely day, so everyone is playing outside. Things take a turn when Roly needs a wee, because the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. The Squirrels start looking around for it, but they have no luck. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector, Helen. After demonstrating it to the Squirrels, they are very keen to give it a go.

programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.desc: The Super Squirrels are called to action! Time to stop Dr Catastrophe and save their toys!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 32
programme.desc: Kyan is completing his 'GoJet Academy' high-wire training, above the Grand Canyon, but he's not the only wire-walker out there...

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 51
programme.desc: When Mum goes out to a baby shower, Dad takes charge of the girls' evening routine. But with Bluey missing Mum, Dad has to pull out all the games he knows to keep them entertained.

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: On a trip to Hammerbarn, Bluey and Bingo create their own mini-homes side-by-side in the trolley. But Bluey quickly gets jealous of her neighbour, Bingo.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 23
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of 'fluffing' in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 5
programme.desc: Globetrotting Andy, Jen and Scout are on a new mission in their Eco-Explorer: to discover more about incredible animal families and their babies.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 11
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels hop inside the Biology Bus and miniaturize themselves to go on a voyage of discovery inside Enid, to find out what's making her cough.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Duggee is making a smoothie and the Squirrels can't agree on whether it's delicious or horrible, so they make their own adventurous smoothies showcasing their favourite flavours to discover what taste is.

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 37
programme.desc: Ubercorn, Foz and Xuli help NASA test their Mars Rover in the Atacama Desert - the oldest and driest desert in the world, scientists think is like Mars itself! Meanwhile, Glitch and Tala have dressed Grim HQ up as a flying saucer to take tourists to Mars. But after losing control, they end up crash-landing in the Atacama. When a science experiment of Tala's starts to

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 36
programme.desc: It's a rainy day and the team are stuck inside, so Foz reads them his favourite book: Around the World in 80 Days by Jules Verne. The Go Jetters imagine they are characters from the story as they listen to a tale of travel by train, boat and even elephant. Will 'Phileas Foz' and his friends make the trip in time?

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S05 - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 15
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn about butterflies and tortoises.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered what goes on at the Squirrel Club when the sun goes down?

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 34
programme.desc: Inspired by his favourite action film, Grand Master Glitch plans to make a blockbuster of his own, but first he needs to find the right setting for an action adventure.

programme.title: Bluey S01 - EP 2
programme.desc: Doctor Bluey is needed when Dad gets a very curious x-ray from Nurse Bingo. It seems he has a cat in his tummy!

programme.title: Bluey S02 - EP 4
programme.desc: When dad and Uncle Stripe play a game of squash, Bluey and Bingo are in control of their every move, and Bingo proves that big siblings don't always beat little siblings.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions S01 - EP 7
programme.desc: In this episode Andy, Jen and Scout head to New Zealand on a baby animal mission to help rescue a family of blue ducks and their chicks from a fast flowing river. Along the way, Andy takes a ride on a pukeko chick and meets a hedgehog.

programme.title: Playtime Towers S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 28
programme.desc: The Squirrels go on the trail of a lost herd of cattle with Duggee and his old pal Rodeo Horse, who teaches them how to be cowhands... and earn their Round Up Badges in the process!

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 27
programme.desc: The Squirrels have played all of their board games, so Duggee entertains them by putting on a Game Show, with some help hosting from his good friend Ladybug.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S03 - EP 26
programme.desc: Happy sets his sights on a very questionable looking puddle that he is determined to splash in, much to the horror of Duggee and the other Squirrels - and the tiny citizens of Midgetropolis who live inside it!

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: The Go Jetters are paddling down Malaysia's Selangor River in canoes to look at the region's fireflies. But after a bend in the river, they encounter Glitch attempting to chop down one of the protected mangrove trees, hoping to impress Tala with the rare plant. Although they manage to stop him, the approaching dark and some thick mud leave them in a tricky situation. Can the team work out how to light their way and find their friends?

programme.title: Go Jetters S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Cadets all over the island tune in to watch Foz present the first Go Jet Academy weather report, which uses high-tech balloons and sea-buoys to predict the weather. But panic ensues when Glitch decides to broadcast his own, fake weather report - leaving the cadets and Grimbots stranded. Can the Go Jetters un-glitch their weather equipment and save the cadets?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends S24 - EP 6
programme.desc: There's a fancy dress competition on the railways and while Thomas and the others are excited, Shankar doesn't want to join in.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 38
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film, but the sound doesn't seem to be working.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck S03 - EP 39
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck explore a Winter Fair in the park, and discover an amazing skating rink inside a giant snowball!

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 14
programme.desc: Stanley helps Fifi and Fred dig up some shiny stones in their garden that turn out to be old bits of mosaic. With the help of Cynthia and Hettie, they put the pieces back together.

programme.title: Stan Can S01 - EP 13
programme.desc: Amare asks Stanley to help her on the farm. Stanley asks Little Woo, Fred and Fifi to join him in sowing seeds, watering plants and picking apples, all whilst having fun.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals S01 - EP 24
programme.desc: Kisses, cuddles, and making renewable energy from cow poo! Parents are brilliant!

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran S02 - EP 17
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran visit a maze and see their friends Alfie and Ellie. They race towards the centre of the maze, but JoJo can't seem to figure out how to get there. Instead of rushing through, she learns to take her time and enjoy the journey.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 7
programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey S03 - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 5
programme.desc: Happy has always loved the water, even though it makes a mess. But while swimming around in his paddling pool at the playhouse, Duggee reminds the Squirrels that there was a time when Happy feared water.

programme.title: Hey Duggee S04 - EP 4
programme.desc: Duggee looks different, but what is it? By playing some looking games, the Squirrels learn how best to spot the difference.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club S01 - EP 20
programme.desc: When Duggee finds some seeds it's time for some gardening!

programme.title: Go Jetters S01 - EP 19
programme.desc: Glitch wants a picnic so he stops the rain in the rainforest, upsetting the local tree frogs.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, it's Gooseberry, singing a song about everything you have to do to become a Gooseberry Club member.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits S02 - EP 1
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits Theatre, Carrot, Potato, Parsnip and Brussels Sprout perform the festive classic Auld Lang Syne - if Potato lands from the moon on time.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 27
programme.desc: Evil Pea blows all the lanterns away during the Lantern Festival. Supertato struggles to get them all back and needs Broccoli's help to save the day.

programme.title: Supertato S01 - EP 28
programme.desc: Supertato shows the Grape Kids how to camp Supertato-style, but Evil Pea arrives and wows them with her ice camping. Before long, the Grape Kids need to be rescued by Supertato.

programme.title: Teletubbies S01 - EP 88
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Yakka Dee S07 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'b', and we go on an adventure around the sound. We see some brilliant beards, blow some bubbles and meet a baboon bouncing balls!

programme.desc: Hey, who turned out the lights? Messy goes to Okido and finds out electricity can lead to music, lights and disco dancing!

programme.desc: Ted the bus wants to be faster, and Mojo swops every top to try to make it happen. But it's Bo's homemade rocket that gives Ted the boost he needs... all the way into space!

programme.desc: Barbabravo, Barbalala and Barbabeau are fed up with their brothers and sisters laughing at their expense.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before! // Dora helps Boots find his lost banana blankie before it's bedtime at the sleepover party!

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 201
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size.

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas S1 - EP 101
programme.desc: When Santiago discovers the lost treasure of the legendary Capitan Calavera, he and his friends become the new Pirate Protectors of Isla Encanto.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 210
programme.desc: Barbazoo have plenty of things to write about in his diary!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S7 - EP 702
programme.desc: When three big mail deliveries are needed around the world, there's only one monster machine who can deliver it all: Mail Truck Blaze! He'll swim across seas, climb mountains, and venture to the Monster Dome --because mail trucks ALWAYS deliver!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S4 - EP 402
programme.desc: Everest and Jake try to rescue a little penguin and end up floating out to sea on a homemade bridge. // Katie's kittens are all covered in mud and running amuck! If they're not rounded up, the Cat Show will be ruined.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S7 - EP 703
programme.desc: Travelling Travis is on another great adventure when he lands in Antarctica but believes he's actually on Mars.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 225
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 226
programme.desc: When Speed Meister steals Rubble & Crew's bus, the pups have to stop it in time for Sierra Sparkle's big concert! // It's the perfect beach day in Builder Cove! If Rubble & Crew can build a lifeguard tower so the beach can open...

programme.title: DORA S2 - EP 213
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Map help Tio Tesoro find his treasure trackers and become a treasure map again. // Dora and Boots investigate a mysterious key so they can discover more about Dora's great-great grandma, the first exploradora.

programme.title: DORA S3 - EP 301
programme.desc: Dora helps Ratoncito Perez fix his magic toothbrush wand so she can get a gift for her missing tooth. // Dora meets Carlos, a giant caterpillar who wants to be a butterfly! They need to find some butterberries that will help him transform.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 113
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 114
programme.desc: Mr. Strict's twins visit the barbababies. The barbababies organize a treasure hunt for the twins and enjoy the great outdoors. // The Barbapapas are off to a new adventure... in the garden. But living in nature is more complicated than they expected.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 115
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 116
programme.desc: Barbabeau can't paint. He has a hiccup he can't get rid of. Just when he's about to give up, he accidentally creates a new artistic movement. // Barbalib wants to compete in a writing contest but his brothers and sisters stop her from concentrating.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S1 - EP 117
programme.desc: Like a secret agent, Barbabravo leads the investigation equipped with his gadgets to find out who stole Barbapapa's cake. // Barbalala is convinced she heard a giant hen prowling around the house. The Barbababies organize themselves to stand guard.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 311
programme.desc: A herd of bison are migrating through Builder Cove-right toward City Hall! Rubble & Crew hop in their big vehicles to save the day. // The pups use their mega-sized trucks to help Lucas and Lily give their parents the most awesome anniversary ever.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S3 - EP 312
programme.desc: Park Ranger Rose and Rubble & Crew discover a meteorite outside of Builder Cove! But when Speed Meister and Mega Meister try to take it, the pups need their giant construction vehicles to save the town and get the meteorite to the Science Center.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S10 - EP 1024
programme.desc: Digi and Tal's inventions to help a busy Mayor Goodway go haywire. // Mayor Humdinger squeezes himself into the Trekkers' dune buggy race, while his cheating ways put the other racers in jeopardy.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S10 - EP 1025
programme.desc: Rocky Kitty runs away to join the Paw Patrol, he becomes a hero when he helps rescue Humdinger and the kitties // When Digi and Tal confuse a request for goat cheese and create a goat out of cheese instead, they wind up the target of a hungry eagle.

programme.title: Deer Squad S3 - EP 307
programme.desc: When Lola and Jade think they see mermaids in Sparkle Sea, Jade uses a Glow Crystal trying find them and disturbs the deep-sea fishes below. // Steel convinces Bobbi to harvest a fire-fruit on Sparkle Island but they set off a volcano unexpectedly!

programme.title: Ben & Holly's Little Kingdom S1 - EP 112
programme.desc: The children wonder where stars go in the daytime. They can't find the answer, so go to the Great Elf Library. // Ben and Holly meet Betty Caterpillar, but she is sad because she can't fly, until she turns into a beautiful butterfly.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S1 - EP 102
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S4 - EP 408
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew help Auntie Crane when Speed Meister challenges her to see who's the fastest soap box car racer in Builder Cove. // When Wingsy the eagle is having takeoff trouble, Rubble & Crew work with Dr. Diwa to help teach her how to fly again.

programme.title: Santiago of the Seas S1 - EP 101
programme.desc: When Santiago discovers the lost treasure of the legendary Capitan Calavera, he and his friends become the new Pirate Protectors of Isla Encanto.

programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Grumpy Old Troll untwist his tongue with Quickatoo's help. // Dora and Boots help Chompy find another Cloud Flower Seed after he accidentally eats Isa's.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S12 - EP 1205
programme.desc: When the Adventure Bay potluck food goes missing, the Safety and Rescue pups deputize the whole community to track it down.

programme.title: PAW Patrol S9 - EP 919
programme.desc: After Moby swipes the Whale Patroller - and all the Pups' vehicles with it - the pups climb aboard sea creatures to chase it down

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S4 - EP 403
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 218
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble & Crew know just what to build.

programme.title: Deer Squad S4 - EP 402
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space S2 - EP 202
programme.desc: Tim sets out to prove Kai's Dad is Captain DinoStar // Tim tries to relax, but Tia has other ideas // Tim gets the best cookies in town but soon finds that others need them more than him

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S8 - EP 807
programme.desc: When three construction emergencies break out all over town, Blaze must save the day by becoming: Tool Truck Blaze! With a toolbox full of amazing tools, Blaze is ready to hammer, drill and saw through any obstacle in his way! Tool Truck Power!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S8 - EP 808
programme.desc: Blaze and Crusher face off in an off-road showdown: the Snow, Sea, Sky Race! The trucks must speed through the snow, swim through the sea, and soar to a finish line in the sky! Will Blaze win the trophy? Or will Crusher be the all-terrain champion?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 207
programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew S2 - EP 208
programme.desc: Cafe Carl opens up a smoothie shop on the boardwalk! But when the coaster causes coconut chaos, Rubble & Crew know just what to do. // Rubble & Crew work together to find a construction solution when Charger's bouncy birthday surprise needs a lift!

programme.title: PAW Patrol S5 - EP 502
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos' archeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the creature that may have taken it. // Mayor Humdinger pretends to break his toe in order to win a race, so the pups build him a mobility device.

programme.desc: Bonnie steals Lorelai's bracelet, turning herself into a mermaid and while trapping Lorelai in human form! // Santi and crew must overcome ghostly shenanigans to save Cecilia from the dreaded Ghost Ship

programme.desc: Tim and Kai go crater surfing and attempt a cool new trick. // Tim and Kai attempt to rebuild Dad's childhood spaceship. // Tim tries to rid the house of a troublesome space bug.

programme.desc: // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom.

programme.desc: Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away, but ruling isn't as easy as it looks. // Ben and Holly discover that Nanny Plum is a tooth fairy, and head out with her, but they're shocked when they see the little girl they're visiting.

programme.title: BARBAPAPA - One Big Happy Family! S2 - EP 207

programme.desc: When Harper is missing an ingredient to make her Mom’s favorite dessert on Mother’s Day, Eden enlists the help of her fellow Dew Drops to do an emergency city-wide ingredient search! / When Marcus records a video of his inventions, Phoebe gets caught on camera and must erase the footage before Marcus sees, or her Dew Drop cover will be blown!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: It’s Game Show Day in the dollhouse! Our wily and well-groomed host, CatRat, leads Gabby and Pandy around the dollhouse, where they compete in Gab-ified games, like Tushy Tunes on the “butt xylophone” couch and a cooking competition of Bakey with Cakey. They win tickets and trade them in for prizes at the end.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Gabby unboxes a pirate treasure map in the shape of the dollhouse (a piece of it has been torn off). This must mean it’s time for a pirate treasure hunt in the dollhouse! Pirate Gabby and Pirate Pandy head out on their journey across the many “lands” of the dollhouse to find the Gabby Cats Treasure!

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: It’s Kate’s birthday and everyone in the habitat has something amazing planned- but Melman’s worried that his homemade/hoof-made gift won’t measure up. While on a no-holds barred quest to get Kate her favorite cupcakes, Melman learns the gift doesn’t matter, as long as it comes from the heart.

programme.title: Madagascar: A Little Wild S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Gloria becomes determined to earn her Queen of Kindness Kidizen badge and welcomes some free-spirited rats who need a place to stay into the habitat. Despite her discomfort, Gloria encourages the rats to make themselves at home. When the rats play with her special baby tusk at the bottom of her tank, she finally snaps and sends the rats home. It isn't until the gang winds up at the rats' nest and Gloria almost takes a slice of the rats special cheese that she learns it's okay to say no.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Kelp has a new trick with his bubbles: he can have his friends put voice messages inside that you hear when you pop them. But when Pixie decides she doesn’t want the others to hear what’s in her bubble, the chase is on to rescue it! / Juniper is devastated when the traditional ceremony to celebrate her next level of spark achievement can’t happen. Kelp helps introduce a new tradition.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Kelp writes a song about him and Scallop to perform at the unicorn show. But when it comes time, Scallop wants to keep the song “just for them”, leaving Kelp to come up with anew act- and fast! / The kids all visit the magical musical plant greenhouse on Unicorn Land. They each pick a plant to take care of, and for Kelp it’s a sad, almost dead plant that he falls in love with.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch embark on a road trip to Chew York City to track down Kelly Korgi to ask her to perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party.\ When Kelly Korgi tells Tag she can’t perform at Pawston’s 100th birthday party, she and Scooch decide to create a Kelly Korgi replacement so that she doesn’t break her promise to the town.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Tag tries to prove to Mom that she’s a big dog by puppysitting Yip and Rhonda all day. All she has to do is get them to the playground, but the pups keep running off. \ When a giant, bone-shaped, roller coaster ride goes missing from the Amusement Bark, Detectives Tag and Scooch take on the case of the slobbery robbery.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: New girl in town Felicia shows off her robo-dog but it runs out of control, and TZG must secretly stop the barking bot from wreaking havoc. / When Lula starts gathering birthday wishes from folks around town, TZG secretly keeps her surprise party under wraps.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: While the others care for baby dragons at the roost, Dak, Winger, Burple and Aggro come face-to-face with a grumpy old dragon on a dangerous island.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 14

Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2

Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.desc: Police hunt for the mastermind of the 2009 Jakarta bombing, but are stunned to find the bombing's signature matches that of a long-dead terrorist.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 12
programme.desc: Just after sunrise, investigators respond to a local hospital where an elderly woman is fighting for her life after a brutal six-hour assault. Though injured, the victim can describe the vicious assault.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: After an 80-year-old woman vanishes, local police and the FBI team up in the pursuit of a suspected serial killer.

programme.title: The Life & Murder Of Nicole Brown Simpson - EP 2
programme.desc: After years of torment, Nicole files for divorce, embarking on a new chapter that includes a risky affair with one of OJ's close friends. But a failed reconciliation led Nicole to a final, fatal stand.

programme.title: #TextMeWhenYouGetHome (S2) - EP 11
programme.desc: When reliable 22-year-old, Molly Jane Matheson, didn't show up for work, her mother Tracy drove to her Fort Worth, Texas apartment to check on her.

programme.title: Lie Detector: Truth Or Deception - EP 1
programme.desc: Years after Gary Coleman’s controversial and tragic death, his ex-wife agrees to take a polygraph test to confront lingering suspicions and silence the rumours that she was responsible for his death.

programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village—showing the risks of policing Alaska’s wild terrain.

programme.title: CI Asia: The "tooth 16" Sex Fiend
